use_cases: Display customer or client logos on a landing page for social proof
Showcase brand partnerships in a testimonial section
Feature notable clients or customers in a SaaS product page
Create animated brand displays for marketing websites
Build social proof sections with staggered reveal animations
ai_summary: A customers section component featuring animated logo or brand displays with multiple Framer Motion animation presets including fade, slide, scale, blur, and zoom effects. The component uses staggered child animations with configurable variants for creating engaging social proof sections on landing pages and marketing sites. Designed for SaaS and e-commerce platforms needing to showcase client logos or partner brands.
